title: A just workplace is essential for sustaining public trust in institutions. Discuss the relationship between workplace ethics and institutional legitimacy.
description: Q7. A just workplace is essential for sustaining public trust in institutions. Discuss the relationship between workplace ethics and institutional legitimacy.
